titleStmt.title: SII 16.16: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 16. (A.R. No. 408 of 1926.) PALAGURĀḶḶAPALLE, BADVEL TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the ruined temple of Bhairava on a hillock, two miles to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1318, Dhātu, Vaiśākha śu. 10, Wednesday, corresponding to 1396 A.D., April 18. The weekday was, however, Tuesday.

The record states that on the representation of Gōli Avubhaḷanātha who repaired the temple of Bhairavadēva on the hill and built a circumambulatory passage and a wall around it, Birudarāju Lakkayadēva Mahārāju and Allāḷadēva Mahārāju who ruled over Sakali-Pedakōḍūru, granted certain lands near the hill as vṛitti for raising a grove to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī hariharanāṁthāya namaḥ
© Avighnamastu . śrī kṣētrādhipatayē namaḥ . svastiśrī
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1318 Agunēṁṭi dhālusaṁvatsara vaiśā
kha śu 10 bu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara śrīvīradēvarāya O
ḍayalu Udayagirini prithivirājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīma
tu birudarāju lakkayadēvamahārājuluṁnnu Allāḷadēvama
hārājuluṁnnu sakali pedakōḍūru yēlucuṁḍaṁgānu Ā vūri
koṁḍamīṁdi bhairavadēvarasthānamu jīṁrnnamai yuṁḍaṁgānu gōli [Avu]
bhaḷanāṁthaṁḍu Ā bhairavadēvara guḍi lessagāṁ gaṭṭiṁci tirigirānu rā
tikōṭa veṭṭiṁci Ā koṁḍa samīpānanu bhairavadēvaraku vanamu veṭṭiṁ
cēnani Avubhaḷanāṁthaṁḍu Aḍigitēnu lakkarāju Allāḷarājuṁgā
ru yiccinaṭuvaṁṭi kṣētrānaku sīma tūrppunaku goḍlavīṭi teru
vu kumārasvāmi kāluva dāṁṭipoṁgānu tigaveṁca Āvali ko
ṁḍa mōnapu dakṣiṇānakuṁ goṁḍa . paḍumaṭiki yisukatuvva
bhaṁḍideruvukoṁḍa mōnapudāṁkānu Uttarānaku reṁḍu de
ruvula kūḍali pai yī nālugu sīmalakuṁnnu lōnunnu Ā tippala na
ḍimikuṁṭanu yi stimi Ā kṣētrānanu māmiḍlu ciṁtalu nārikē
ḷālu pāṁkamrāṁkulu yīṁdulu sahitamaina phalavṛkṣālu
tāḍlu yeṁnni veṭṭinānu Aṁdula phalamuṁnnu Ā nēlanu peṭina A
ṭuvaṁṭi Āraṁbhamuṁnnukōru sahitaṁgānu bhairavadēvaraku
vritti yi stimi yī vritti ĀcaṁdrākkaNsthāyigānu cellaṁga
ladi . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī bhairavāya namaḥ .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śrī hariharāyanamaḥ
yī sāsānaṁ kācāyabaktuni vrālu .
Digital edition of SII 16.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
